text.text:
*Summary:* 11 unresolved issues · Critical: 2 · Moderate: 2 · Trivial: 1 · Noise: 5 · Tickets created: 4 new · Auto-resolved: 1
*Incident mode:* No (11 issues, under 20 threshold)

*Auto-Resolved (1):*
- :white_check_mark: *Error: ssr:false not allowed in Server Components (stats/page.tsx) — MIT-MAP-34* — Main branch already uses `TaiwanMapDynamic` wrapper (Client Component with `dynamic()`); worktree-specific error, not present in main.

*<https://yung-tang-chou.sentry.io/issues/MIT-MAP-1B|column brands.mit_story does not exist — homepage crash>*
Events: 88 · Recurring (since 2026-06-18) · Severity: Critical
Run `supabase db push` to apply migration `20260705130000_add_mit_story_to_brands.sql` — the ALTER TABLE statement is ready but unapplied.
Ticket: <https://linear.app/ytchou/issue/DEV-955/apply-mit-story-migration-to-supabase-column-missing-crashes-homepage|DEV-955> — Apply mit_story migration · Priority: Urgent · Labels: Bug, L

*<https://yung-tang-chou.sentry.io/issues/MIT-MAP-S|Module not found: Can't resolve 'react-simple-maps' — /stats page crash>*
Events: 3 (82 total) · Recurring (since 2026-06-11) · Severity: Critical
Verify `pnpm install` is complete and `react-simple-maps` is present in `node_modules`; check for Turbopack resolution issues with this package.
Ticket: <https://linear.app/ytchou/issue/DEV-956/fix-react-simple-maps-module-resolution-on-stats-page|DEV-956> — Fix react-simple-maps module resolution · Priority: Urgent · Labels: Bug, L

*<https://yung-tang-chou.sentry.io/issues/MIT-MAP-W|brand_onboarding_steps table missing in Supabase schema cache — dashboard crash>*
Events: 3 · Recurring (since 2026-06-12) · Severity: Moderate
Apply migration `20260701090000_create_brand_onboarding_steps.sql` and reload Supabase schema cache. Companion client-side error: MIT-MAP-1C.
Ticket: <https://linear.app/ytchou/issue/DEV-957/apply-brand-onboarding-steps-migration-table-missing-in-supabase|DEV-957> — Apply brand_onboarding_steps migration · Priority: High · Labels: Bug, M

*<https://yung-tang-chou.sentry.io/issues/MIT-MAP-35|TypeError: fetch failed — /guides page crashes when TinaCMS not running>*
Events: 4 · New (2026-07-05) · Severity: Moderate
Add error handling in `src/lib/services/guides.ts` for ECONNREFUSED on port 4001 (TinaCMS dev server); return empty list gracefully.
Ticket: <https://linear.app/ytchou/issue/DEV-958/handle-tinacms-connection-failure-gracefully-on-guides-page|DEV-958> — Handle TinaCMS connection failure gracefully · Priority: Normal · Labels: Bug, S

*:white_circle: Noise Issues (5) — no tickets*
- MIT-MAP-2J: Brand not found `e2e-edit-banner-…` — e2e test data in dev DB (3 events)
- MIT-MAP-8: Error: aborted — HTTP connection abort, Seer actionability: super_low (3 events)
- MIT-MAP-36: Brand not found `e2e-verification-…` — e2e test data in dev DB (1 event)
- MIT-MAP-37: SyntaxError: Unexpected end of JSON input — /_error, 1 event
- MIT-MAP-20: SyntaxError: Unexpected end of JSON input — /_error, 1 event

_Note: MIT-MAP-1C (dashboard client-side error) is the client-side reflection of MIT-MAP-W (same trace ID); covered by DEV-957._

*Tickets Created (4):*
- <https://linear.app/ytchou/issue/DEV-955/apply-mit-story-migration-to-supabase-column-missing-crashes-homepage|DEV-955> — Apply mit_story migration (Priority: P1, L)
- <https://linear.app/ytchou/issue/DEV-956/fix-react-simple-maps-module-resolution-on-stats-page|DEV-956> — Fix react-simple-maps module resolution (Priority: P1, L)
- <https://linear.app/ytchou/issue/DEV-957/apply-brand-onboarding-steps-migration-table-missing-in-supabase|DEV-957> — Apply brand_onboarding_steps migration (Priority: P2, M)
- <https://linear.app/ytchou/issue/DEV-958/handle-tinacms-connection-failure-gracefully-on-guides-page|DEV-958> — Handle TinaCMS connection failure (Priority: P3, S)

1 issue auto-resolved (not ticketed) · 0 duplicates skipped
